---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

[Download PDF]( cv.pdf ){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

<!--
Drop your PDF CV in this folder as `cv.pdf` and the button above will serve it.
The structured version below is optional — keep it in sync, or delete it and
rely on the PDF alone. Want an icon on the button? Install Font Awesome once
(`quarto add quarto-ext/fontawesome`) and use `{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download PDF`.
-->


## Education

**PhD in Economics** · ETH Zürich · 20XX–present
: Dissertation: *working title*. Advisor: *name*.

**MSc in [field]** · [University] · 20XX–20XX

**BSc in [field]** · [University] · 20XX–20XX


## Research

- *List working papers, publications, and works in progress here, or link to the
  [Research](research.qmd) page.*


## Teaching

- **[Course name]**, ETH Zürich — Teaching Assistant (Semester 20XX)


## Presentations

- *Conference / seminar*, Location, Year


## Grants, awards & fellowships

- *Award / grant name*, Year


## Skills

- **Languages:** *e.g. German (native), English (fluent), ...*
- **Software:** R, Stata, LaTeX, Git
- **Fieldwork:** survey design, data collection, field management
